permissions.reason: The fixture does not model project-wide OpenCode permission configuration.
permissions.fallback: Retain the host's existing approval and sandbox policy.

progress.reason: No OpenCode-specific progress presenter is included in the minimal adapter.
progress.fallback: Emit ordered workflow transitions as concise transcript messages.

subagents.reason: The minimal adapter does not declare an OpenCode subagent integration.
subagents.fallback: Run delegated work sequentially in the active validated worktree.
